## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between Marcel and Molly to discuss growth, hiring, and operational updates for fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Business is experiencing rapid growth with multiple high-value deals closing quickly](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Aggressive hiring needed across roles (SEO, brand design, AI prompt engineering) with focus on international talent (South Africa, South America)](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Exploring potential fundraising opportunities due to strong market validation and growth](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Operational focus on client retention and over-delivering on service to support growth](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Topics

### Business Growth and Strategy

  - [Recent successes: Closed a six-digit deal in one week, another at $15,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Aiming for $2 million equivalent ARR by November](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Exploring $5-10 million seed round due to market validation](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Strategy: Prioritize client retention and service quality over margin optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Considering slowing growth to build out tech and make the business more defensible](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Hiring and Talent Acquisition

  - [Urgent need for new hires: 2 new people per month to keep up with growth](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Expanding talent search to South Africa for all roles due to favorable language skills and cost structure](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Adding Argentina and other South American countries for creative roles](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Posted new positions for brand designer and AI prompt engineer](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Seeking 3-4 new SEO specialists with profiles similar to Bisera and Andre](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Exploring U.S.-based hires for certain roles, including a "Jimmy 2.0" clone](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [All new staff paid for August; Remote set up for auto-draft on the 1st of each month](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Molly given access to Ramp card for equipment purchases (cameras) with $500 monthly limit](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Exploring alternatives to Remote for employment services due to high costs (currently \~25% for lower-paid roles)](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Onboarding and Training

  - [Need to develop comprehensive SOPs for day one, day two expectations, and training](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Goal: Streamline process from hire to full productivity to save Marcel's time](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

### Financial Management

  - [Marcel seeking referrals for accounting firms to support growth](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Exploring fundraising options to capitalize on current momentum and market opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/Ed-cKrc5r6792-K54Xont9y4jxxzhsgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
